# MNN Third-Party Assets

This folder keeps notes for MNN-related local assets.

Large model files under `third_party/mnn/models/` are intentionally ignored by Git because GitHub blocks files over 100 MB. Keep model weights locally, publish them through GitHub Releases, cloud storage, or a model download flow when needed.

Native libraries required by the APK are stored in:

```text
app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/
```
